name: alert-keyvault-secret-per-item
description: Fires one alert per Key Vault secret expiring in exactly 30 days. Each unique vault + item triggers a separate alert with the vault name, item name, and days remaining in the email subject. Only fires once per item at the 30-day mark.
query:
KeyVaultCredentialInventory_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by VaultName, ItemType, ItemName
| where ItemType == 'Secret' and HasExpiration == true and DaysToExpiry == 30
| project VaultName, ItemName, ItemType, DaysToExpiry, ExpiresOn, SubscriptionId, ResourceGroup, ExpiryBand
